$comment: Repo-local config for the spec/dev/qa board sweeps. Copy to <target-repo>/.claude/linear-sweep.json and fill in. Nothing in the skills is hardcoded — they read this file.
projectId: <project uuid — get it from: node scripts/linear.mjs ensure-project "<team>" "<project>">
issuePrefix: <team key used in card ids, e.g. COD>
repos: <repo folder name(s) the sweeps may touch>
$comment_runtime: Which agent CLI the auto-sweep launcher dispatches for this workspace, and the per-sweep model + reasoning effort. Omit a model/effort to fall back to the runtime's own default (~/.codex/config.toml or Claude Code settings). For a claude workspace, set runtime='claude' and use claude model ids (e.g. claude-opus-4-8).

canonicalDocs.$comment: Single-repo projects can point architecture at CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md and leave schema null. Multi-repo setups name a canonical schema.md/architecture.md pair.

deploy: <how this project reaches production — e.g. 'Vercel auto-deploys on push to main; some changes need a Vercel env var, a DB migration applied, or a platform CLI deploy'>
credentialsNote: <where app + tooling secrets live — e.g. '.env.local for app secrets; Linear key in gitignored .env'>
